def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    breakout_multiplier = params['breakout_multiplier']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.average_true_range(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period)
    df['breakout_level'] = df['close'].rolling(window=atr_period).mean() + breakout_multiplier * df['atr']
    signals = np.where((df['close'] > df['breakout_level']) & (df['rsi'] > 50), 1, np.where((df['close'] < df['breakout_level']) & (df['rsi'] < 50), -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits momentum breakout behavior where price exceeding ATR-based breakout levels combined with RSI confirmation signals high-probability trends.
